title: Fragment: To One Singing.
content:
My spirit like a charmed bark doth swim
    Upon the liquid waves of thy sweet singing,
    Far far away into the regions dim

    Of rapture - as a boat, with swift sails winging
    Its way adown some many-winding river,
    Speeds through dark forests o'er the waters swinging...

    NOTES:
    _3 Far far away B.; Far away 1839.
    _6 Speeds...swinging B.; omitted 1839.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Percy Bysshe Shelley, titled "Fragment: To One Singing.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
